message.text: Habt ihr das auch gehabt? Ein Bett ohne Füße, auf dem Boden, überall weiße Flokatis. Es war die Zeit von Deep Purple, Uriah Heep, Cream, Stones, Genesis, dann Klaus Lage und so viele mehr. Das war so ab 1976 bis circa 1984. Überall in der Wohnung meiner Eltern roch es nach Patchulli und Räucherstäbchen. Der tägliche Kampf um lange Haare, Klamotten und rauchen, hat einen schon nicht mehr interessiert. Heute haben Eltern andere Probleme mit ihren Kindern

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model

items.text:
Wenn ein Schauspieler auch mit Musik berührt, bleibt ein Abend ganz anders im Herzen 

Sandra und ich, Christian, haben Florian Thunemann in der Wundertüte in Köln-Sülz live auf der Bühne erlebt, an seiner Gitarre als Begleitung einer Band, und dieser Abend war für uns weit mehr als nur ein schöner Barbesuch. 

Viele kennen Florian Thunemann aus seiner "filmischen Erfahrung" in „SOKO Leipzig“ im ZDF, „Wege zum Glück - Spuren im Sand“ im ZDF sowie „Alles was zählt“ bei RTL und auf RTL+. Umso besonderer war es für uns, ihn an diesem Abend nicht nur als starken Schauspieler wahrzunehmen, sondern auch als Musiker, der mit Gefühl, Ruhe und echter Hingabe spielt. 

Sein Gitarrenspiel hatte Wärme, Tiefe und eine ganz eigene Sprache. Es war nicht nur musikalische Begleitung, sondern ein Ausdruck von Persönlichkeit, Präsenz und künstlerischer Reife. Genau diese Verbindung aus Schauspielkunst und Musik hat uns berührt und diesen Abend für uns so erinnerungswürdig gemacht. 

Auch die Wundertüte selbst hat dazu wunderbar gepasst. Ein Ort mit Charakter, ehrlicher Atmosphäre und einem echten Herz für Kultur. Genau solche Bars sind es, die Live-Momente nicht nur möglich machen, sondern ihnen Seele geben. 

Lieber Florian Thunemann, danke für diesen besonderen Abend. Und auch an die Wundertüte ein herzliches Danke für einen Ort, an dem Kunst, Musik und Begegnung so schön zusammenfinden. 

Kennst Du Florian Thunemann bislang eher aus dem Fernsehen, oder würdest Du ihn auch gern einmal live mit seiner Musik erleben? 

Lass es mich gern im Kommentarfeld wissen ;-) 

Christian Weiße / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion  

#FlorianThunemann #WundertüteKöln #AllesWasZählt #LiveMusik #KölnSülz

message.text:
🎬 DRUGI CASTING W SHALIK STUDIO!

Dla Modeli, Aktorów i Statystów ✌️

Po świetnym odbiorze pierwszego spotkania… czas na kolejną edycję! 🔥
Zapraszamy na drugi casting w Shalik Studio, który odbędzie się:

📅 21 i 22 marca w godzinach od 11 do 18.
📍 ul. Rękawka 10/2, Kraków

Szukamy osób otwartych, kreatywnych, z energią przed kamerą - zarówno z doświadczeniem, jak i tych, którzy dopiero chcą spróbować swoich sił w pracy przed obiektywem 🎥

To przestrzeń do:
– poznania naszego zespołu,
– sprawdzenia się przed kamerą,
– udziału w przyszłych projektach foto i wideo,
– wejścia w świat artystycznych realizacji w klimacie Shalik Studio.

Nie musisz mieć profesjonalnego portfolio — liczy się osobowość, naturalność i gotowość do działania.

📩 Link do zapisów: 

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1qsRCjv2Bp2Qo6lbHZp_VqtyG2Gaqs9py1AeaQMgyeK0/edit?chromeless=1

WAŻNE INFORMACJE 👇👇👇

CZAS
Na każdą osobę przeznaczamy do 10 minut pracy przed kamerą i obiektywem.

KOLEJNOŚĆ WEJŚĆ
Kto pierwszy ten lepszy. Przychodząc do studia zapisujesz się na listę i wchodzisz za jej kolejnością.

CO ROBIMY NA CASTINGU?
 • zdjęcia castingowe (portret + sylwetka)
 • krótka wideo wizytówka na jednolitym tle
 • networking

WIDEO WIZYTÓWKA
 • autoprezentacja (imię, czym się zajmujesz)
 • monolog / improwizacja / performance (krótka forma) Stawiamy na naturalność - nie wymagamy perfekcji ani gotowych ról, aczkolwiek są mile widziane.

 UBIÓR
 • prosto i neutralnie, causal
 • bez dużych napisów i logotypów
 • naturalny makijaż i fryzura

 NA MIEJSCU
 Dostępne będą:
 • kawa
 • herbata
 • woda
 • drobne przekąski

Dlaczego warto dołączyć do naszej bazy?

 a) osoby zapisane w bazie będą w pierwszej kolejności informowane o planowanych projektach (sesje, filmy, reklamy, teledyski, eventy),

 b) stała zniżka -20% na wynajem studia pod własne projekty i wydarzenia,

 c) przy większych realizacjach pomagamy w pozyskiwaniu dofinansowań na projekty artystyczne i filmowe,

 d) współpraca długofalowa – nie jednorazowy casting.

Dobrego dnia! 😉

**Casting Call - EPISODE **

**MARCH 18th, Wednesday**

For a new biographical feature film set in the 1970s, we are looking for **ASIAN MEN aged approx. 20-35, up to 180 cm max., **an athletic build. In role** future MILITARY PERSONNEL**.

**Make-up and possible haircut: March 16th or March 17th**

**Rate: 450 PLN per shooting day**

**Characterization Guidelines:**
* Absolutely no tattoos
* Hair must be short, but cut without the use of hair clipper
* No facial hair (clean-shaven)
* Athletic build

**Please apply to:** **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**
**Subject Line:** **MC 18**
**Email Content:** Name and surname, age, phone number, city/town of residence, nationality + measurements: height, chest, waist, hips, clothing and shoe size.
**Attachment:** **PHOTO OF FACE AND FIGURE: taken only on the day of application + profile photo**

**FACE PHOTO** – portrait selfie in daylight, straight-on, looking into the lens. No filters. No glasses. No head covering. Colourful.
**FIGURE PHOTO** – in clothing that shows the outline of the figure.

Kampania społeczna 1,5% dla Małych Braci Ubogich

Projekt pro bono (bez wynagrodzenia) – udział w ważnej kampanii społecznej.

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa, Bródno
📅 Zdjęcia: 23 marca 2026

Szukamy:

Nastolatki (3 osoby)
wiek 16–18 lat, dziewczyny i chłopcy.
Klimat fajnych dzieciaków z osiedla, które spotykają się na ławce / murku pod blokiem.
Jedna z osób (chłopak) powinna mieć swobodę aktorską.

Chłopiec (1 osoba)
wiek 10–12 lat.
Trochę rozrabiaka, charakterystyczny, zadziorny.
Duża lekkość w graniu emocji.

⸻

📩 Zgłoszenia:
impresariat.cametstudio@gmail.com

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do końca dzisiejszego dnia - 13.03.26 piątek 

Wybrane osoby otrzymają krótkie scenki do nagrania.
Prosimy o odesłanie nagrania w linku do prywatnego YouTube do:

⏰ 14 marca do godz. 12:00

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – FAULTLINE (Short Film)**
**URGENT: Casting Midlands-based actors for late‑March shoot**

Hi everyone, I’m a final-year Film Production student at the University of Derby, urgently casting for my graduation short film *Faultline* - a gritty coming-of-age drama set in 1980s Derby. The story follows a troubled teenage boy torn between gang loyalty and the last person fighting for him: his grandmother.

We are looking for Midlands-based actors for several lead, supporting, and extra roles, with self-tapes needed as soon as possible.

**Project type:** Student short film
**Filming locations:** Stoke & surrounding Midlands areas
**Shoot period:** End of March : 22nd to 28th

Roles available:

**SCOTT (Playing age 16–21)**
A tough, emotionally guarded Midlands teenager drawn into the skinhead scene. Beneath the bravado, he’s vulnerable and conflicted, forced to choose between loyalty to his gang or a chance at redemption.
**Note:** Actor must be comfortable shaving their head on screen for one scene.

**SI / HENNO / SHAW / DAZ (Playing age 16–21)**
Members of a local skinhead gang. Intimidating, confrontational, and deeply loyal to their group.
**Note:** Actors must be comfortable shaving their heads for the role.

**JUNE (Playing age 65–75)**
Scott’s grandmother. Warm, gentle, and quietly resilient, she offers unconditional love and becomes the last person truly fighting for Scott’s future.

Please note:

This is a low-budget student production, so unfortunately we are unable to offer payment. However, all travel expenses will be covered, and food will be provided on shoot days.

Auditions will be self-tape, with shortlisted actors invited to an online call-back in Derby.

If you’re interested, please email: saskianatalyafilms@outlook.com where you will be able to receive the full casting call for character breakdowns and submission details.

Thank you so much - and please feel free to share with anyone who might be interested!

items.text:
Hi! We’re currently casting for an upcoming YouTube Imposter Series,to take part in a conversation while trying to identify the “imposter” in the group.

We’re reaching out to see if any of your members would be interested in taking part. It’s a fun, conversation-based video about acting, and a great chance for participants to showcase their personalities and gain exposure.

If anyone from your society is interested, they can sign up here. We’d also really appreciate it if you could share it with your members:  
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf9WkezvlEdc-p2U2jttABpEtWYUi_mf-FVpsSVxAFGTFfcEQ/viewform?fbzx=-4212969923431272085&fbclid=PAVERFWAQinPJleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA8xMjQwMjQ1NzQyODc0MTQAAaeX7VhTSGudwM93dbFEKnHoGjAwSkxFAxKmcMxGL9VlQrk34_FbF_CZ_0hnrA_aem_9txVOlNPY4qFp6-yAxN2hw

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING: The project is called Easy Money. We have actors that have worked on Avatar: The Last Airbender, Fire Country, and Mulan to name a few. Our DOP has done camera work on The Good Doctor. This is an independently funded project, so the actors will not be paid. We are going through the union under ULB. Please DM me your headshot, demo reel, resume, and socials. Only potential candidates will be contacted. Actors will receive footage and IMDB credit. 

Ryan 
Age: 30-50
Gender: Male
Description:
He is a businessman. Think The Wolf of Wall Street. He does blow to keep his energy up throughout the day.

Helen
Age: 40-58
Gender:  Female
Description:
By day, she is a bus driver, and by night, she gets high on crack.

Alisha
Age: 25-35
Gender: Female
Description: She is a sex worker who does heroin. She offers a sexual favor to Alex in exchange for drugs.

Gurvinder
Age: 25-40
Gender: Male
Description:
We are looking for an East Indian or someone who can play that. He is from Surrey and was a former high school soccer player. He is an obnoxious character. Very arrogant. He likes to party hard on the weekends by drinking Crown and snorting coke with his homies.

topComments.text: You get what you pay for

items.text:
**“MAX” CASTING CALL – SASKIA**

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of SASKIA in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE “SASKIA” FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

21 – 30 years old.

Female-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Wednesday 18th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Sunday 22nd March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.

items.text:
HELLO, HELLO ! 

**CASTING DO REKLAMY // super stawka – SZUKAMY MŁODYCH OSÓB (20–30 LAT)!**

KOCHANI,

Do projektu reklamowego dla sieci restauracji **MESO (Mesopotamia)** poszukujemy **kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 20–30 lat** – aktorów, epizodystów oraz modeli.

Szukamy osób o **naturalnym, miejskim stylu**, które tworzą wrażenie autentycznej grupy znajomych przy stole – ważna jest **swoboda przed kamerą, energia i szczery uśmiech**

 **Na co szczególnie zwracamy uwagę:**
• naturalny, szeroki uśmiech (z widocznymi zębami)
• ekspresyjna mimika
• spontaniczne reakcje na jedzenie
• młodość, energia, lifestyle’owy vibe (bardziej autentyczność niż klasyczny modeling)

 Obsada: **2 kobiety + 2 mężczyzn** tworzących grupę znajomych.
Typ europejski, dowolny kolor i długość włosów

 **Uwaga:** scena obejmuje konsumpcję jedzenia zawierającego **mięso, gluten i inne możliwe alergeny**, dlatego osoby niejedzące mięsa lub pieczywa glutenowego prosimy o niezgłaszanie się

 **Lokalizacja:** Warszawa
 **Terminy:**
• recall – 19.03.2026
• przymiarki – 20 lub 21.03.2026
• zdjęcia – 24.03.2026

 **Stawka:**
**Łącznie z prawami to 4500 brutto (w tym prowizja Agencji)**

 **Jak się zgłosić?**
Przygotuj **selftape** i wyślij przez formularz:
 https://incognitostudio.pl/index.php/meso/

**W zgłoszeniu należy dodać:**
***zdjęcie portretowe
***wizytówkę (z uśmiechem pokazującym zęby + sylwetka i dłonie)
***krótką scenkę – zjedzenie fingerfood/fastfood z dłoni i entuzjastyczna reakcja na smak

W ZGŁOSZENIU W LINKU PODAJEMY AGENCJĘ UNAGI MEDIA / KONTAKT DO AGENCJI casting@unagimedia.pl 

 **Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń:**
**wtorek 17.03.2026 do godz. 22:00**
(po tej godzinie link przestanie być aktywny)

POWODZENIA! 

**Pozdrawiamy Was serdecznie, **

**Zespół Unagi **

UWAGA MAZURY!!!!!
CASTING ON LINE NA EPIZODY NIEMIECKOJĘZYCZNE!!!!!
Jeżeli Chcesz przeżyć niesamowitą przygodę, zobaczyć jak wygląda praca na planie filmowym i wystąpić z największymi gwiazdami  kina to w miesiącach  maj, czerwiec  będziemy realizować zdjęcia do serialu kryminalnego produkcji niemiecko-polskiej "Der Masuren Krimi", do udziału w którym serdecznie zapraszamy zdolnych epizodystów ze ZNAJOMOŚCIĄ JĘZYKA NIEMIECKIEGO, Kobiety i Mężczyzn w wieku 18- 50 lat.
Stawka ustalana jest indywidualnie.
Zdjęcia odbędą się na Mazurach.
Zapewniamy zwroty kosztów podróży oraz hotel.
Zgłoszenia z dopiskiem SERIAL zawierające imię i nazwisko,  aktualne (ZROBIONE DZISIAJ!!!!) zdjęcie twarzy (bez nakrycia głowy) i aktualne zdjęcie sylwetki, WIZYTÓWKA (LINK YT) W JĘZYKU NIEMIECKIM  oraz numer telefonu  prosimy przesyłać na maila:
mario@mkmstudiofilm.pl
Prosimy też o nie ingerencję w fryzury i wygląd zewnętrzny.
Z wybranymi osobami będziemy kontaktować się telefonicznie.
Poczuj magię kina razem z nami.
OJ BĘDZIE SIĘ DZIAŁO!!!!!
Serdecznie Zapraszamy
Załoga MKM Studio

Hej wszystkim  Nazywam się Maria Głębocka (aka Mary Sophie) i jestem aktorką pracującą w filmie, telewizji i reklamie. Przez lata studiowalam i pracowalam aktorsko w Londynie i Manchesterze i od 2 lat mieszkam w Warszawie.

Szkolę się m.in. w technice Meisnera w Meisner Institute i chętnie nawiążę współpracę przy nowych projektach czy produkcjach niezależnych. 

Zapraszam do kontaktu na priv badz przez marysophieactress@gmail.com 

 Portfolio: www.marysophieactress.com

Materialy i wizytowka: https://linktr.ee/marysophieactress

items.text:
THE MINK SLIDE TABLE READ
THE MINK SLIDE FEATURE FILM TABLE READ

Join us for a live table read of The Mink Slide, narrated by writer and producer Owen Woodard and brought to life by a talented cast, featuring selections from one of the most riveting historical accounts of Columbia, Tennessee, a pivotal yet often overlooked chapter of American history.

Returning Black World War II soldiers demanded dignity and equal treatment. Their courage ignited community unrest and a landmark legal fight led by civil rights attorneys Z. Alexander Looby and Thurgood Marshall.  drawing national attention to the injustice unfolding in Columbia, and cementing a story that must be told.

*Free and open to the public.

Doors Open at 5:30 p.m.

Table Read starts at 6:00 p.m.

Z. Alexander Looby Theater

2301 Rosa L. Parks Blvd

Nashville TN 37228

Click Below To Save Your Seat

https://minkslidetableread.eventbrite.com/

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'THE MINK SLIDE TABLEREAD EREAD Experience ience a LIVE reading from the upcoming ng feature film Exper inspired by the 1946 uprisi ng Columbia, lenn lennessee essee FRIDAY MARCH 27, 2026 DOORS OPEN 5:30P/ EVENT STARTS 6P Z. ALEXANDER LOOBY THEATER FREE AND OPEN TO THE PUBLIC PRESENTEDBY METRO METROARTS ARTS NSANILL おうのじかゃ THE MINK SLIDE EAP internationali H black film festival'

🎬 POP-UP IMPROV SHOOT & AUDITION📍 RJ Props – Atlanta🗓 Tuesday, March 17⏰ 4PM – 8PM
Calling all **actors and creatives**! Join us for a live **improv shoot and on-camera audition session**. This is a relaxed creative environment where actors can jump into scenes, practice on camera, and connect with other filmmakers and talent in the Atlanta film community.

🎬 **Actors may have a big chance at getting selected for upcoming films currently in development for theatrical release and major streaming platforms.**

Whether you want to **perform, audition, network, or observe**, you’re welcome to come out and be part of the creative process.

⭐ **Limited scene slots available**

📩 **RSVP:** HonestEarthSolutions@gmail.com
📞 **Questions:** 404-210-9029
📬 Or DM to let us know you’re coming.

PS.  There might be Papa Johns Pizza.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CALLING ALL ACTORS & CREATIVES! POP-UP IMPROV SHOOT 10 TOMORROW! ON SET RJ PROPS ATLANTA TOMORROW: TUESDAY, MARCH 17TH 4PM 8PM HAVE A BIG CHANCE AT GETTING SELECTED FOR UPCOMING FILMS THAT WILL BE ON THE BIG SCREEN! Improv Shot & Audition Jump Into Scenes Practice On Camera Network & Create IN COLLABORATION WITH RJ PROPS UADRILLIONTH TRILITH Attanta AHEISTAINESICAF AMTISTA 4ESUAF DON'T MISS THIS CHANCE TO BE ART OF THE ACTION! DM if interested so we know who' coming!'

items.text:
**🚨[PAID CASTING - LONDON] 🚨 Real Families & Actors Needed for Short "Street Interview" (Vox Pop) Video! 🎥📚**

Hi everyone! We are producing a fun, fast-paced social media video about children’s education and the famous **"Oxford Reading Tree"** curriculum. We are looking for confident, articulate people to take part in a quick "street interview" style shoot in Central London.

**🎭 ROLES REQUIRED:**

**👉 ROLE 1: Families (Looking for 3 Families)**
* 1 or 2 Parents alongside their child (Child must be aged **7-11**).
* Happy, natural, and comfortable chatting on camera.

**👉 ROLE 2: Adult Interviewees (Looking for 3 Individuals)**
* Men and Women, playing age **25-40**.
* Articulate, friendly, and confident. (Teachers, tutors, or parents are highly encouraged!)

**📅 SHOOT DETAILS:**
* **Location:** Central London (Outdoors on a nice street or outside a bookstore - Exact location TBC).
* **Dates:** One day between **Thursday 2nd April and Tuesday 7th April** (Easter Holidays).
* **Time Commitment:** SUPER SHORT! You will only be needed on set for approx. **15 minutes** per interview.
* **The Content:** We will ask you a few simple questions about children's reading habits and the Oxford Reading Tree. We will provide the questions and general talking points in advance, but we absolutely LOVE natural improvisation and your own genuine thoughts!

**💷 COMPENSATION:**
This is a paid project. As it is a very quick 15-minute shoot, please let us know your expected flat fee (inclusive of your local travel to Central London).

**📩 HOW TO APPLY:**
Please email **[ju@idealwhale.com](https://www.google.com/url?sa=E&q=mailto%3Aju%40idealwhale.com)** with the following details:
1. A recent photo / headshot (If applying as a family, please include a family photo).
2. Your availability between April 2nd - 7th.
3. **Your expected flat fee** for this short 15-minute shoot.

Please feel free to share or tag anyone who might be interested. Thank you! ✨

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Fancy yourself in a period production? Do you have a face that fits the era?

A late 19th-century period production is currently looking for Supporting Artists / Background Performers to bring the world of the story to life.

📍 Filming Locations:
Leeds, York, Derby, Hull, Sheffield & Bradford

📅 Shooting Period:
April – July (various days across this period)

👥 Who we’re looking for:
* Ages 18+
* All genders and ethnicities welcome
* No acting experience required (but always a bonus!)
* People with a natural or adaptable look for historical settings especially welcome

💰 Pay:
Union Rates – approximately £130–£250 per day (depending on hours worked)

🎥 What you’ll get:
* Paid work on a professional production
* Experience on a film/TV set
* Opportunity to work with cast & crew on a major period project

Please register and create a profile on our Alessi Hartigan Casting UK database and we’ll be in touch with briefs shortly! Link in bio

items.text:
**CASTING: Real-Life Couple for MFA Short Films — PAID**

**Project:** Three short advertisement films (each under 1 min) for an MFA graduation project. Playful, humor-driven tone — think witty and suggestive, never explicit. The films combine AI-generated imagery with live-action footage.

**Looking for:** A real-life couple, any ethnicity, ages 20–35. No acting experience required — comfort on camera and willingness to take light direction is what matters.

**Intimacy note:** Scenes include kissing, embracing, and suggestive gestures. NO nudity. All intimate content will be discussed and agreed upon in advance. Boundaries will be documented in a written consent form. Intimate scenes filmed on a closed set.

**Shoot details:** 📍 Vancouver, BC 🗓 20/21 March (one day, approx. 8 hours total) 💰 CA$100 per person (flat rate) + meals on set 🎥 You'll receive finished footage for your reel/portfolio

**To submit:** Email 357045123Q@gmail.com with: — A recent photo of both of you — A brief note about yourselves (acting experience optional) — Your availability

⏰ **Deadline: 19 March**

Non-union student production. Questions welcome!

items.text:
Casting Call for the [https://wssf.com/](https://wssf.com/) 72hr Film Maker Showdown. **Title:**72 film fest submission.

**Format:** Short Film

**Union:** Non-Union

**Location:** Whistler, BC 

**Production:** Created for the Whistler Ski and Snowboard Festival 72-Hour Filmmaker Showdown

**Shoot Dates:** March 27–28, 2026

**Compensation:** Volunteer / Copy & Credit

Transportation from Vancouver will be provided Friday and Saturday if needed.

**Production Note**

This project is being produced as part of a **72-hour film competition** and will be created on an accelerated schedule.

Our goal is to keep the shoot **organized, collaborative, and enjoyable**. While the timeline is tight, this will not be a "run-and-gun chaosproduction". The focus is on having fun, working together creatively, and ensuring everyone walks away with **a strong piece for their reel**, regardless of the competition’s final outcome.

Our team **won this event many years ago**, and we’re excited to return for the **30th anniversary** of the WSSF. 

*This note will be updated as roles are filled.*

⸻

**ROLES**

**DYLAN — LEAD**

Male, **25–55** ( flexible) 

Confident, intense, and charismatic. Dylan carries himself like someone completely certain of his place in the world and speaks with unwavering conviction.Charismatic, stubborn, and relentlessly self-assured.The character should be played with total sincerity — the humour comes from how seriously Dylan takes himself.Actor should be comfortable with subtle physical performance and strong deadpan delivery.

⸻
# **JOSEPH  — SUPPORTING (Role has been Cast)**

Male, **45–70** (flexible)

An eccentric intellectual type with a calm, thoughtful presence. Joseph speaks slowly and deliberately, often with philosophical weight behind his words.Dry, deadpan delivery and strong character instincts preferred.

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Demo reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted with short audition sides for a self-tape. Feel free to reach out via email with any questions.

**Subject Line:**

[ROLE NAME] – [ACTOR NAME]

**Send submissions to:**

72hourfilm2026@gmail.com

**Submission Deadline:**

March 17th

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of mountain and road

topComments.text: If you need a female actress!
Thanks to everyone for the submissions so far, looking foreward to going them this weekend!

items.title: **🚨[PAID CASTING - LONDON] 🚨 Real Families & Actors Needed for Short "Street Interview" (Vox Pop) Video! 🎥📚**

items.text:
Hi guys! 

Posting for a second time as we’re still on the hunt! Also have slightly more info to share. Please read below carefully and send me a message if you fit the profile and are interested in auditioning. 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. You need to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. AGE is really important!!! They also need to be from London. The more authentic the better! 

Also looking for another male actor 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. This character is an estate agent with much higher ambitions. Slightly reserved but willing to bend rules to get the job done. 

Please comment below or send me a DM for more info. We are casting urgently so need to move fairly quickly. Free agents are preferable but not necessary. Get in touch asap!!

items.title: Hi guys!

items.text:
**The Oscars remind us of one simple truth: every great performance begins with deep work on the craft. **

**If you're an actor ready to go further, this year The Quiet Collective is hosting **two immersive acting retreats in Italy with world-renowned Hollywood acting coaches**. These experiences are designed for professional and emerging actors who want focused training, deep exploration, and meaningful mentorship.**

**Embodying the Character in Film and Theatre**

**Mentors: Jean-Louis Rodrigue & Kristof Konrad (Alexander Technique coaches to Margot Robbie, Keanu Reeves)**

** May 3–10, 2026**

** 3 spots remaining (currently 20% reduced)**

**Awakening the Authentic Self**

**Mentor: Howard Fine (coach to Brad Pitt, Leonardo DiCaprio, Michelle Williams)**

**June 21–28, 2026**

**5 spots remaining (currently 20% reduced)**

**These mentors rarely teach in Europe. This is a rare opportunity to train with them in a focused retreat setting in Italy.**

**If your next role is waiting, the work starts now.**

** Learn more: **

items.text:
CASTING: **ROLA GŁÓWNA** (wiek wizualny 28-32 lata).

Szukamy **kobiety-aktorki-artystki** do filmu **„Ciało obce”** – do roli wymagającej skrajnej ekspresji emocjonalnej: od paraliżującej apatii po gwałtowną histerię i fizyczny ból.

Poszukujemy osoby o wysokiej wrażliwości, zdolnej oddać skomplikowany portret kogoś zmagającego się z hafefobią, traumą i bolesnym wyobcowaniem we własnej cielesności.
* **Projekt:** Niezależny dramat psychologiczny, festiwalowy, płatny.
* **Miejsce zdjęć:** Góra Kalwaria.
* **Termin:** Kwiecień/Maj 2026 (4–5 dni, termin do uzgodnienia).
* Wymagania: Odwaga emocjonalna, wysoka wrażliwość.

**ETAPY CASTINGU:** I. Casting online | II. Casting na żywo.

Zgłoszenia przez stronę WWW (zakładka CASTING):

Wymagane zdjęcia: portret, cała sylwetka oraz twarz sauté. Mile widziane portfolio.

[www.ompictures.pl](https://www.google.com/search?q=https://www.ompictures.pl)

Czekamy na Twoją energię!

#casting #aktorka #film #GóraKalwaria #hafefobia #ompictures #filmindependent #dramat #sauté

items.text:
Casting dla rodzin -CAŁA POLSKA
🚨 CASTING DO NOWEGO PROGRAMU TELEWIZYJNEGO! 🚨

Produkcja ogólnopolskiego programu telewizyjnego poszukuje rodzin z całej Polski, które chciałyby przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę i wziąć udział w projekcie pokazującym, jak bardzo mogą różnić się codzienne realia życia.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Kogo szukamy?

Szukamy dwóch typów rodzin:

🔹 Rodzin żyjących skromnie, które każdego dnia mierzą się z finansowymi wyzwaniami, ale mają w sobie dużo ciepła, energii i autentyczności.

🔹 Rodzin bardzo dobrze sytuowanych, prowadzących komfortowe życie, które są otwarte na nowe doświadczenia i chciałyby na chwilę spojrzeć na codzienność z zupełnie innej perspektywy.

To niezwykła okazja, aby poznać inny świat, przeżyć coś wyjątkowego i pokazać prawdziwe życie polskich rodzin.

💰 Co oferujemy?

✔ wynagrodzenie finansowe za udział w programie

✔ pełne wsparcie produkcji podczas realizacji

✔ niezapomnianą przygodę i wyjątkowe doświadczenie

📍 Szukamy rodzin z całej Polski

📩 Jak się zgłosić?

Wyślij zgłoszenie na mail: dwierodziny@gmail.com

W wiadomości podaj:

• imiona i wiek domowników

• miejscowość

• krótkie nagranie telefonem (kilka zdań o Waszej rodzinie i sytuacji życiowej)

• numer telefonu do kontaktu

✨ Może to właśnie Wasza rodzina stanie się częścią tego wyjątkowego programu!

Zamożne rodziny z luksusowym życiem Przeżyj niezwykłą przygodę i zobacz życie z innej perspektywy! Wysokie Pełne wynagrodzenie! wsparcie produkcji! ZGŁOŠ SIĘ TERAZ! dwierodziny dwierodziny@gmail.com @gmail.co Telefon Filmik zgłoszeniowy!'

Hi everyone!
Sharing on behalf of the production team — they are looking for a wardrobe replacement for the Ballet of Lights show in Denver for the following dates:

• This Saturday, March 14th 

• May 3rd

If you’re available and interested, please email Skylar Burks directly at skylar.burks@feverup.com for details and booking information.

Feel free to share with anyone who might be a good fit. Thank you!

items.title: TWO ACTORS NEEDED

items.text:
**Title:** Exit Wound 

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A young man chooses between love and opportunity as he breaks news that could have devastating implications to his relationship over an anniversary dinner.

**Role: **RICK (30's-50's) Rick is confident, charismatic, and commanding but the charm masks deep insecurity. He clings to control as the only way he knows how to keep someone close. He fears abandonment but fears being truly seen even more.

**Director/Writer:** Gatlin Zbylski 

**Assistant Director: **Jack Brown

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please send all submissions to gatlinjack777@gmail.com. Either Director or Assistant Director will follow up with you.

**Run Time:** Short. 7-11 Minutes.

**Compensation: **Unpaid. Meal and Reel provided!

**Union Status: **Non-stop

**Audition Information:** Please send Headshot, Resume, and attached self-tape audition sides to gatlinjack777@gmail.com no later than ***Friday, 03/13/26 by 8PM. ***Reels accepted but not required.

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th, night shoot. March 21st, day shoot begins in afternoon. Exact times TBD.

**Filming Location: **11553 Pink Phlox Drive Parker, Colorado 80134.

**Project Description: **Light intimacy (kissing) and combat (thrown dinner plate at other character) required for role. Any combat or matters of intimacy will be detailed in the Intimacy Consent Form, discussed in depth, and rehearsed to Actor's comfort level.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – JOHANNESBURG / PRETORIA ACTORS 🎬
Hi everyone! I’m casting for a short-form comedy web series called Anomalies Anonymous.

👻 Anomalies Anonymous is a mockumentary-style comedy about supernatural beings attending a support group to deal with the challenges of living among humans.

The series follows characters like a fruitarian vampire, a vegan werewolf, a gorgon who struggles with eye contact, a dragon with anger issues, and a ghost who accidentally scares people.

📍 Details:

• Independent short-form comedy series

• Episodes approx. 1 minute long (for social media)

• Filming in Johannesburg / Pretoria

• Unpaid passion project

• Great opportunity for showreel footage and comedic material

🎭 Characters:

🧛 Popovici – vampire

🐺 Gregory – werewolf

🐍 Elena – gorgon

🐉 Iggy – dragon

👻 Sipho – ghost

👤 Daniel – invisible man (voice role)

📩 Interested?

Email me for the audition packet and sides:

caraleanespence17@gmail.com

Feel free to share with actors who might be interested!

✨ Looking forward to hearing from you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎불크 ANOMALIES ANONYMOUS Safe Space for theUnusual Unusual -Thursdays 7PM All Welcome CASTING CALL ANOMALIES ANONYMOUS Mockumentary Comedy Social Media Series NO JUDGMENT JUSTSUPPORT JUST SUPPORT TOFU BLOOD ORANGE احراه JUICE Pretoria / Johannesburg Multiple roles (20s-40s) Unpaid- Reel footage provided Self-tape auditions caraleanespence17@gmail.com @gmail.com Deadline: March 22, 2026 Audition packet available upon request‎'‎

items.title: CASTING

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/

items.summary:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/

items.text:
**CALLING FILMMAKERS & CREATIVES** 🎬

I’m looking to collaborate with talented people in film for **both paid and unpaid opportunities** as we continue building and expanding our productions.

We’re currently open to connecting with:
• **Producers**
• **Directors**
• **Camera Crew**
• **Lighting Crew**
• **Sound / Audio**
• **Make Up Artists**
• **Anyone working in film who wants to collaborate**

We already have a solid team in place, but we’re **always open to expanding our network** and working with passionate creatives. Some projects are **paid**, while others are **collaborative as we raise funds for bigger productions**.

If you’re interested in **building, creating, and growing together**, feel free to **inbox me** and let’s talk.

🎥 Let’s make something great.

items.text:
CREATIVES WANTED. Step into purpose and growth. 🎭✨

We’re inviting singers, dancers, actors, musicians, writers, creatives, and artists of all kinds to be part of a huge stage production.

This is more than a performance. It’s a learning experience.

✨ Training, guidance, and creative development will be provided

✨ Grow in skill, discipline, teamwork, and purpose

✨ Use your gifts in a meaningful, mission-driven environment

Whether you’re experienced or still discovering your craft, there’s room to learn, train, and rise together.

Message us to learn more and take your first step into this journey.🌍✨

items.text:
Help me get the word out to families! I’ll be attaching a flyer—please feel free to share it with your database and post on social media.

If you know a teacher or mentor who would like to be featured, I’d love to connect with them as well.

Call or email me with any questions. Thank you for helping spread the word

Make sure they mention your program and my name when applying and I can fast track their applications straight to the producers 

 NOW CASTING! 

Know a curious kid who loves building, tinkering, coding, or experimenting?

A brand-new **Netflix competition series — Schooled! — from Mark Rober’s CrunchLabs is looking for bright young minds ages 9–17 to compete in teams of two for an INSANELY HUGE cash prize. 

 Creative thinkers

 Robotics lovers

 Problem solvers

 Hands-on builders

Kids can apply solo or with a partner (friend, classmate, sibling, or STEM teammate).

 Parents must apply with their kids.

Please share with your friends, family, followers — anyone who might know an amazing young inventor, builder, or future engineer.

Apply here: [https://crunchlabsacademy.com/](https://crunchlabsacademy.com/)
items.title: SCHOOLED - Netflix Competition Series Casting
items.summary:
Help me get the word out to families! I’ll be attaching a flyer—please feel free to share it with your database and post on social media.

If you know a teacher or mentor who would like to be featured, I’d love to connect with them as well.

Call or email me with any questions. Thank you for helping spread the word

Make sure they mention your program and my name when applying and I can fast track their applications straight to the producers 

 NOW CASTING! 

Know a curious kid who loves building, tinkering, coding, or experimenting?

A brand-new **Netflix competition series — Schooled! — from Mark Rober’s CrunchLabs is looking for bright young minds ages 9–17 to compete in teams of two for an INSANELY HUGE cash prize. 

 Creative thinkers

 Robotics lovers

 Problem solvers

 Hands-on builders

Kids can apply solo or with a partner (friend, classmate, sibling, or STEM teammate).

 Parents must apply with their kids.

Please share with your friends, family, followers — anyone who might know an amazing young inventor, builder, or future engineer.

Apply here: [https://crunchlabsacademy.com/](https://crunchlabsacademy.com/)

items.text:
🗣️ REAL PEOPLE CASTING 🥞
Live in Philly? Gen Z? Love to bake + make pancakes? This one’s for you! 🍪

Working with Dig Projects (https://digprojects.com/) to find participants for an upcoming research project (think of it as a cross between marketing and a documentary).

PAID opportunity where we’ll be chatting with real baking enthusiasts about their preferences and everyday lives — it’s not an ad, just internal research featuring authentic voices.

🥐 If you or someone you know might be a good fit, please fill out this quick form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdVyZR6W1W6WXF-TwJi6wAznzhXPHJIkRFOmur-sT707YrdeA/viewform

🧁 Feel free to share with friends, family, neighbors, anyone in the Philadelphia area who isn't afraid to talk about baking (oh yeah, and if you refer someone who gets selected, you get $100!). 

Questions? Hit my comments!

#marketingresearch #strategyinsights #documentaryfilmmaking #casting #philly #philadelphia #realpeople #GenZ #baking

topComments.text: Hi! I saw your post about the opportunity and I’m really interested. I’m a teen actress with theater experience and would love to learn more about it. Could you share the details or how to get involved? Thank you! I am in Colorado.

items.text:
THE GIFT OF GAB — GET PAID FOR IT!

We're looking for American-born talkers living in Southern California for a fun 4-hour recorded VO session — answer questions, get expressive, run some dialogues, and help train the next generation of AI. We're on a mission to capture every dialect spoken across the United States. Boston, Texas, Midwest — you name it, we want it. If you grew up anywhere in this country and have an accent to prove it, you're exactly who we're looking for.

$325 an hour for 4 hours. That's $1,300 just for being yourself.

Must be American born and living in SoCal. Data release form required. Your voice goes public to support ethical AI research.

Apply at [https://voices.castingcrane.com/](https://voices.castingcrane.com/)

Or Email [casting@wyldsidemedia.com](mailto:casting@wyldsidemedia.com)

items.text:
# **Casting Call for RED, proof of concept short**

Non-union

Short Film/Proof Of Concept

This is a short excerpt of a longer film used as a proof of concept. The film consists of two scenes that hint at its larger themes. We are only producing the proof of concept as of now. 

Please send an email to **Red.film.2026@gmail.com**, with the subject line being "**Casting Submission - (Insert Character name)**", by **March 19th**. Please include Headshot, Resume, and Reel (If Available)

Director: Zev Lemke

Writer: Zev Lemke

Producer: Samantha Teasdale

Casting Director: [Jacob Ellis](https://www.facebook.com/jacob.ellis.376695?__cft__[0]=AZboTo04r8L-ADFF47mM3TZop9TEVBanY09bd2p7DbkuE2nuKa8JJahubuiIUMeVdbjPTWfBOKucr8ci3zIGiDx14XRekgNqB6OnYTjBS6lzgRZWeWaE3vUil5DacY7S8Fo&__tn__=-]K-R)

Shoot Dates: EARLY APRIL(10-14ish)

Rate of Pay: Volunteer, Reel Footage, and end credits.

Location: Vancouver/British Columbia

**Logline:**

In this modern retelling of Little Red Riding Hood, an underage Reid ventures into a nightclub for the first time. When he locks eyes with a seductively sly older man, he finally feels wanted. But under the street lights, the man’s insatiable charisma now seems ravenous, and the boy must confront a terrifying truth: some people are truly wolves in sheep's clothing. 

Content warning - This proof of concept discusses themes of sexual assault and the repercussions of it. This shoot does not include any nudity or depictions of the assault. However, the full film will include nudity and depictions of sexual assault. Actors in this shoot may be considered for the full film.

**CHARACTERS:**

Reid (Lead, 18-22) – 18 years old, average height, slim build. Reid is in the midst of queer adolescent self-discovery. There's a cautious optimism to him, and he sees the world full of possibility, even if he's not sure where he belongs in it yet. In the aftermath of a sexual assault, he struggles to fully process his experience and broken worldview. To persevere, he must suppress his emotions, and only once he gets ‘out of the woods’ does the impact of the night begin to hit him. 

Aiden (Supporting, 18-22, Plays 17) - average build. Aiden is extroverted, loud, and magnetic. Beneath her confident, brash exterior is a deep need to be seen and validated, which drives her to chase validation and engagement at all costs. Aiden can be superficial, often prioritizing image over real-life connections. She tends to treat Reid more as a ‘gay best friend’, an accessory, than as a person with his own needs and hesitations. 

Tracy (Supporting, 40s) – Greyish-brown hair, thin. A single mother who works long hours as a nurse, Tracy loves her son deeply but struggles to connect with him on an emotional level. Though she’s accepting of his sexuality and loves him unconditionally, it subtly shapes how she relates to him.  Reid’s self-expression often unsettles her, not due to any judgment, but from an anxiety of how the world might treat him. The mother and son were once close, but Tracy and Reid have drifted apart during his tumultuous teenage years. When Tracey comes home to find Reid on the floor she is terrified for her child.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: *The Classic Frenemy* (4 min Drama)

Simon Fraser University Surrey Campus 
| 250 - 13450 -102 Avenue
 

Shooting Date: 

March 19th (Thu) 3:00 PM-7PM (flexible shifts ok) 

Meeting Location:  

- Third floor, opposite the library when exiting the elevator — in the seating area behind the partition wall that includes the microwave and handwashing station.

Filming Location Note:  

- Filming will primarily take place in the third-floor hallway opposite the library (from the elevator direction) and in the seating area behind the partition wall with the microwave and handwashing station. A portion of the scene will also be filmed on the second floor, in the main seating and table area.

Compensation: 

- Digital copy
- Credit 
- Reel footage

Logline: 

- When a meticulous clever student   named Character 1 catches her jealous classmate Character 2 sabotaging her assignments, she sets a clever trap to expose and get revenge.

CASTING 2 Female Actors (18+, college age):  

Character 1: A committed student who consistently get A’s.   

Character 2: A student who is jealous of Character 1 since she believes getting an A is impossible. 

Supplies (Please bring if you have it; we'll provide otherwise):

- Bring either a binder or notebook with written notes 

-2 fake quiz sheets with one marked in A and one in B. It can either be a quiz with questions with grades drawn on it or two pieces of quiz report with those grade written on it. E.g without questions but rather a large title indicating Quiz 1 and in the bottom of the title it says grade:———. *But keeping it simple works.

- Laptop with Google Classroom open

Costume Required: 

- Completely opposite-colored outfits (including sleeves) — e.g., one wearing green/ one wearing red, blue/pink — to give a very clear picture on which character is which between the two characters. 

- Please bring glasses if you are Character 1 (your own or decorative/fake pair)

Project Members: Susan Song, Ben Liu, Ben Park

Post Sent By Susan Song 

Contact: 

- 778-723-9578

- ssa705@sfu.ca

Hello everyone! 

Enrolment is now OPEN for our next online screen acting course! 

🎭Class 1 for ages 8 - 13 years

 

🎭Class 2 for ages 14+

 

📆STARTING MONDAY 13th APRIL 2026

🎬With personalised mentorship from industry professionals, students build confidence, creativity, and real insight into film & TV acting

We've had some lovely feedback on our previous online classes!

Classes run for 90 minutes. Places on the course are limited.

Email us today for more information -

classes@mcaa.co.uk

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzny do roli żandarmerii państowej**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje mężczyzny **w wieku 25 – 40 lat** **bez zarostu w obwodzie klatki 90 – 95 i pasie 85 – 90 o wzroście najlepiej 175 **do roli niemieckiego Schultzpolizei. Postać ta wystąpi w 3 scenach z czego w 2 będzie mieć kilka kwestii po niemiecku. Kostium będzie podobny do tego umieszczonego w załączniku.

** **

 Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
HELLO, HELLO ! 🥰

CASTING DO REKLAMY // super stawka – SZUKAMY MŁODYCH OSÓB (20–30 LAT)!☺️

KOCHANI,

Do projektu reklamowego dla sieci restauracji MESO (Mesopotamia) poszukujemy kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 20–30 lat – aktorów, epizodystów oraz modeli.

Szukamy osób o naturalnym, miejskim stylu, które tworzą wrażenie autentycznej grupy znajomych przy stole – ważna jest swoboda przed kamerą, energia i szczery uśmiech🩵

✨ Na co szczególnie zwracamy uwagę:

• naturalny, szeroki uśmiech (z widocznymi zębami)

• ekspresyjna mimika

• spontaniczne reakcje na jedzenie

• młodość, energia, lifestyle’owy vibe (bardziej autentyczność niż klasyczny modeling)

👥 Obsada: 2 kobiety + 2 mężczyzn tworzących grupę znajomych.

Typ europejski, dowolny kolor i długość włosów

⚠️ Uwaga: scena obejmuje konsumpcję jedzenia zawierającego mięso, gluten i inne możliwe alergeny, dlatego osoby niejedzące mięsa lub pieczywa glutenowego prosimy o niezgłaszanie się

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa

📅 Terminy:

• recall – 19.03.2026

• przymiarki – 20 lub 21.03.2026

• zdjęcia – 24.03.2026

💰 Stawka:

Łącznie z prawami to 4500 brutto (w tym prowizja Agencji)

🎥 Jak się zgłosić?

Przygotuj selftape i wyślij przez formularz:

👉 https://incognitostudio.pl/index.php/meso/

W zgłoszeniu należy dodać:

***zdjęcie portretowe

***wizytówkę (z uśmiechem pokazującym zęby + sylwetka i dłonie)

***krótką scenkę – zjedzenie fingerfood/fastfood z dłoni i entuzjastyczna reakcja na smak

W ZGŁOSZENIU W LINKU PODAJEMY AGENCJĘ UNAGI MEDIA / KONTAKT DO AGENCJI casting@unagimedia.pl

⏰ Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń:

wtorek 17.03.2026 do godz. 22:00

(po tej godzinie link przestanie być aktywny)

POWODZENIA! 🏆

Pozdrawiamy Was serdecznie,

Zespół Unagi ❤️

items.text:
CASTING: **ROLA GŁÓWNA** (wiek wizualny 28-32 lata).

Szukamy **kobiety-aktorki-artystki** do filmu **„Ciało obce”** – do roli wymagającej skrajnej ekspresji emocjonalnej: od paraliżującej apatii po gwałtowną histerię i fizyczny ból.

Poszukujemy osoby o wysokiej wrażliwości, zdolnej oddać skomplikowany portret kogoś zmagającego się z hafefobią, traumą i bolesnym wyobcowaniem we własnej cielesności.
* **Projekt:** Niezależny dramat psychologiczny, festiwalowy, płatny.
* **Miejsce zdjęć:** Góra Kalwaria.
* **Termin:** Kwiecień/Maj 2026 (4–5 dni, termin do uzgodnienia).
* Wymagania: Odwaga emocjonalna, wysoka wrażliwość.

**ETAPY CASTINGU:** I. Casting online | II. Casting na żywo.

Zgłoszenia przez stronę WWW (zakładka CASTING):

Wymagane zdjęcia: portret, cała sylwetka oraz twarz sauté. Mile widziane portfolio.

[www.ompictures.pl](https://www.google.com/search?q=https://www.ompictures.pl)

Czekamy na Twoją energię!

#casting #aktorka #film #GóraKalwaria #hafefobia #ompictures #filmindependent #dramat #sauté

sharedPost.text:
Tworzę przestrzeń dla kobiet, które chcą wrócić do swojej, kobiecości i wewnętrznej siły. 
Poprzez prywatną transformację kobiecego wizerunku rozmowę, obecność i subtelne prowadzenie odkrywam to, co w Tobie było zawsze- tylko może na chwilę zostało przykryte codziennością.
Pracuję z kobietami indywidualnie.
Tworzę dla Ciebie przestrzeń jednego dnia, w którym możesz zatrzymać się, spojrzeć na siebie inaczej i poczuć swoją kobiecą energię na nowo. ✨

Podczas naszego spotkania skupiam się tylko na Tobie.
Na Twojej historii i na tym, co w Tobie czeka, żeby znowu wyjść na światło.

Nie jestem terapeutką.
Jestem kobietą, która potrafi zobaczyć w drugiej kobiecie jej siłę, sensualność i naturalne piękno-i delikatnie pomóc jej je odkryć.

To propozycja dla kobiet, które chcą:
🌹poczuć się znowu piękne i pewne siebie
🌹wrócić do swojej kobiecej energii
🌹zrobić coś tylko dla siebie
🌹zacząć nowy rozdział

Działam na terenie Śląska.🌸

Jeśli czujesz, że to coś do Ciebie mówi -zapytaj o ofertę. 💌📩

Czasem wszystko zaczyna się od jednego dnia… i jednej decyzji. 🌙

———————
Foto: Rafał Nikodemowicz

WARSZAWA 25 i 26.03.2026r.

film fabularny

Do filmu fabularnego o początkach kariery Adama Małysza poszukuję Statystów (Panowie i Panie) w wieku 20-50 lat, którzy chcieliby przeżyć przygodę na planie i wcielić się w role takie laboranci, sportowcy czy goście hotelowi. 

Stawka - 120 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: A25 lub A26 (w zależności od wybranego dnia)
Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki z dnia zgłoszenia.
ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

Do zobaczenia na planie :)

The actor should be able to convincingly play a cool, slightly crazy genius.

items.text:
Tomorrow night we finally premiere our latest promo for Kick Ass Film Fest. 

Doors open at 6:30pm at Cottonwood Center For the Arts. Other local filmmakers will be showing their films as well.

sharedPost.text:
The official poster for our Blood and Water 007 promo is finally here! A huge shoutout to Jacob Rivera for the sexy design and a massive thank you to our phenomenal cast and crew—your tireless hard work made this vision a reality. We are so proud to share this project with the Kick Ass Film Fest community and celebrate the local talent that brought it to life.

Join us for the official premiere tomorrow, March 11th, at 6:30 PM at the Cottonwood Center for the Arts. They will also be showcasing several other incredible short films from talented local filmmakers, so come out and celebrate the entire local film scene on the big screen! For those who can’t make it in person, Blood and Water will be officially released online this Monday, March 16th. We can’t wait to see you there!

#kickassfilmfest #coloradofilm #jamesbond #film #filmfestival

items.summary: He has performed with Rodney Dangerfield for eight years before landing two of his own HBO specials. He was on the Johnny Carson show, David Letterman and the Merv Griffin show. From Radio City, Carnegie Hall, the Vegas Strip and Broadway.  You have seen him in the movie, Kindergarten Cop ￼and Brain Donors.  ￼Actor, Comedian, Writer and Producer Bob Nelson (The Bob Nelson Comedy Show).

items.text:
🚨 URGENT CASTING CALL 🚨
We are urgently looking for male actors (who look 25+) to take part in filming tomorrow and Wednesday in London.

Details:

• Must be able to arrive in London by 10am tomorrow

• Transport costs covered

• Hotel accommodation provided

• IMDb-credited role

If you are interested, or if you know anyone who might be interested, please direct message us on Instagram @marchon.shortfilm or email marchon.shortfilm@gmail.com as soon as possible for more information.

Please feel free to share this with anyone who may be suitable.

sharedPost.text:
In case you were wondering… 
YES, you’re missing out! 👀🔥

If you’re an Actor, SPACT performer (Special Action Performer), or Stunt Trainee, combat should be a regular part of your training regimen. 💪

COMBAT LAB @idfight is a unique weekly training session in stage & screen combat — and it’s only £20! 😍🎬💥

✅ 2 hours every Sunday evening
✅ Open to all levels
✅ A new theme each week
✅ No commitment — just show up & train hard

Finish your week right and head into the next one knowing you’re doing the most 👑

📍 Bromley-By-Bow, London
⏰ 19:00–21:00
🔗 Book via the link always in our bio!

This week’s theme is Swords on Film⚔️🎥
⚠️ It’s nearly sold out, so don’t wait!

See you on Sunday! 🙌

#actortraining #london #stagecombat #screencombat #stunttraining

sharedPost.text:
Dive into deeper Actor training with Meisner 2-Imaginary Worlds & Relationships this April! ✨

Explore complex improvisational exercises, where we’ll enhance your skills on the repetition scale, infusing spontaneity and creativity into scene structures.

Open to anyone with previous training and experience in Meisner. Repetition experience/skills essential.

Deepen your emotional preparation techniques, gain a better understanding of healthier emotional triggers and expand your emotional range. Practice handling emotional shifts and refining moments of transition. Explore dynamic relationships in scene structures, fostering strong connections with partners for a more authentic and engaging audience experience.

Our approach prioritises positive consent, delving into emotional consent concepts.

Participants will have the opportunity to deconstruct and reconstruct well-known scenes, building the experience from the ground up.

🎟️ What’s Included:
✅12 in-person sessions at Studio Three, Cockpit Theatre, Marylebone (3 hours each).
✅Personal feedback sessions at request.
✅Regular written guidance, information, and support.
✅Engaging elective homework tasks.
✅THREE free tickets to ongoing Meisner drop-in training sessions throughout the course.
✅Over 48 hours of advice and training if you take advantage of all opportunities.

📅 Course details:
Dates: Saturday mornings 10am – 2pm
Duration: 2nd May - 25th July 2026
Location: The Cockpit Theatre, Marleybone 
Class size: Limited to 12 places for personal attention 

💰 Prices and Payment
* Standard price: £455 (20% deposit required).

The Meisner Technique has consistently proven to build truthful, dynamic acting—the glue that ties all disciplines together! 💡 Join us in a fun, supportive environment that fosters genuine connection and growth. 🌱

BOOK NOW: www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/Meisner-stage-2
Or email - mail@lawrencecarmichael.com

⚡ Limited to just 12 places—secure your spot today! ⚡

#meisnerlondon #londonactor #actorslife #actortraining

🎤 CASTING CALL – FEMALE SINGER
We are looking for a talented female singer with strong stage presence to join our Dinner Show in Dubai. ✨

If you have a powerful voice, versatility in musical styles, and dance skills, this is your chance to be part of a unique live entertainment experience.

🌟 International artists welcome

🎭 Live performance show in Dubai

📩 Send your videos and CV:

📞 +971 54 270 6270

Join us and be part of something spectacular.

**CASTING CALL — AKTOR DO ROLI WIZERUNKOWEJ (FINTECH PROJECT)**

Do realizacji wizerunkowego spotu dla młodej firmy z branży fintech poszukujemy aktora:

**Profil:**
* mężczyzna w wieku 30–45 lat
* biznesowy, profesjonalny wygląd
* naturalna prezencja przed kamerą
* komunikatywny język angielski (min. poziom B2/C1 — wymagane nagranie próbki)

**Szczegóły:**
* zdjęcia w Warszawie
* zaangażowanie: ok. pół dnia zdjęciowego
* termin: do ustalenia (w najbliższym czasie)
* produkcja wizerunkowa / corporate style

Prosimy o przesyłanie:
* aktualnych zdjęć (portret + sylwetka)
* krótkiej próbki wideo w języku angielskim
* informacji o dostępności

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: KANDOR KIN (A Vertical Manifesto)** 🎬

We aren't looking for "actors" to play a part. We are looking for creatives who have lived these truths.

**Kandor Kin** is a visual manifesto exploring the raw reality of the creative industry—the survival mode, the burnout, and the power of a community that actually protects its own. 

We need voices that resonate with the struggle and the solution.

**THE PROJECT**
* **Shoot Date:** March 30th
* **Time:** 1:00 PM – 8:00 PM (Subject to slight shift)
* **Status:** Crew and Location are **LOCKED**.
* **Format:** Vertical Series / Social Cinema

**ROLES NEEDED**
* **[ASHA] – Male, Black, 30s.** The Architect. Stoic and protective. He’s the anchor who figured out how to keep the dollar and the dignity in the community. "Quiet Authority."
* **[ZOR/A] – Male or Female, 20s.** The Survivor. High-alert and guarded. She’s used to being burned and is slowly "thawing." We need someone who understands "masking."
* **[MASON] – Male, 30s.** The Strategist. Blunt and strategically honest. He has no time for "comfort." If you’re the friend who gives the brutal truth because you care, you are Mason.
* **[DRAKE] – Male, 20s.** The Skeptic. Talented, but uses sarcasm as armor. He’s waiting for the disappointment. He wants to trust, but his logic won't let him yet.
* **[JULIAN] – Male, Latin or Black, 30s.** The Success Story. Sharp and high-energy. He didn’t leave the collective to escape; he left to expand it. He represents the "win."
* **[THE STRANGER] – Open Ethnicity/Gender.** The Jaded Freelancer. Overworked and listening from the next table. The person who accepted the crumbs until they heard a better option.

**HOW TO APPLY:** If these characters sound like your current reality—or a version of yourself you’ve fought to outgrow—we want to see you. We value authentic emotion and confidence in the craft.

**TO SUBMIT:** 1. **Comment below** with the role you are interested in. 2. I will reach out individually with the sides/submission info.

**Submissions are due by this Friday.** ✊🏾

topComments.text: Hi Ky :) curious is this paid?

We are casting a series of fast-paced, 30-second (UNPAID) STUDENT PROJECT Specsaver adverts paying homage to the legendary, culturally iconic "Should've gone to..." advertising campaign. This project is all about visual humour, oblivious confidence, and impeccable comedic timing.

We are looking for actors who excel at deadpan delivery and physical comedy. If you can play a character who is hilariously, confidently, and completely wrong about their surroundings, we want to see you!

We will cover meals and drinks as well as travel (Within the merseyside area)

filmed on high quality professional equipment as well as a professional environment and crew

This project will provide you with:
-Showreel footage material
-On-screen credits
-acting experience with a professionally run student production

IF INTERESTED MESSAGE ME PRIVATELY OR APPLY ON OUR MANDY

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 11th April.

Sophia/Soni (22-35) Strong and confident, sassy, eloquent, bold, and can be impulsive. **Any ethnicity.** She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 11th and 12th April.

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. **Any ethnicity**. Shoot on 12th April.

Christine (22-33) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Girlfriend- 23-35, Any ethnicity.

Gym Girl- 25-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 11th April.

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Characater and your name”**

items.summary:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 11th April.

Sophia/Soni (22-35) Strong and confident, sassy, eloquent, bold, and can be impulsive. **Any ethnicity.** She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 11th and 12th April.

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. **Any ethnicity**. Shoot on 12th April.

Christine (22-33) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

Vijay's Girlfriend- 23-35, Any ethnicity.

Gym Girl- 25-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 11th April.

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

sharedPost.text:
Action! are going filming. 🎬
Our community theatre group is taking the next step, creating original short films so our actors, writers, and creatives can gain real film experience and build showreels.
To do it properly, we need a small filming kit.
So we’ve launched our first Crowdfunder.
If you can spare £5, you’ll be directly helping local performers create something real and giving people opportunities they wouldn’t otherwise have.
Every single contribution moves this forward.
Support us here:

https://crowdfunder.co.uk/actionfilm

If you can’t donate, sharing this helps more than you know.
Thank you for backing local creativity.

items.text:
Hi guys! 

Posting for a second time as we’re still on the hunt! Also have slightly more info to share. Please read below carefully and send me a message if you fit the profile and are interested in auditioning. 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. You need to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. AGE is really important!!! They also need to be from London. The more authentic the better! 

Also looking for another male actor 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. This character is an estate agent with much higher ambitions. Slightly reserved but willing to bend rules to get the job done. 

Please comment below or send me a DM for more info. We are casting urgently so need to move fairly quickly. Free agents are preferable but not necessary. Get in touch asap!!

items.text:
# CASTING CALL – STUDENT GRADUATION FILM

Project Title: *Sanctuary*
Production: Graduation short film for Wiltshire College & University Centre

Logline:
A quiet young woman struggling with isolation in her daily life encounters a small moment of creativity that sparks a sense of reflection and possibility.

Style & Inspiration:
The project is a 5–10 minute experimental short film exploring themes of nostalgia, growing up, and the quiet emotional moments of adulthood. The film is inspired by the visual and tonal style of All About Lily Chou-Chou and Chungking Express.

## ROLES

**LUNA (Lead)**
Female
Age: 18–29
All ethnicities welcome

Description:
A quiet and introspective young woman navigating feelings of loneliness and emotional distance in her everyday life. Much of the performance will rely on subtle expression and physical acting rather than dialogue.

Key Scenes:
• Workplace isolation among coworkers
• A reflective journey on public transport
• A late-night walk leading to a mysterious discovery

Notes:
Comfortable performing subtle, introspective moments with minimal dialogue.

_______________________

**ANGEL (Supporting)**
Female
Age: 18–29
All ethnicities welcome

Description:
A supporting presence connected to Luna’s emotional journey. The role helps shape the tone and emotional contrast within the story.

EXPERIENCE

Actors of **any experience level are welcome to apply**. This project is open to students, emerging actors, and performers building their showreel.

SHOOT DETAILS

Location:
Filming will take place across locations between Salisbury and Bournemouth, with most scenes shot around Salisbury.

Shoot Dates:
Expected shooting window:
Week of 23rd March – 29th March 2026
Plus one/two additional shoot day(s) in April 2026 (exact date to be confirmed).

**COMPENSATION**

These roles are unpaid. However, the production will provide:

• Food during shoot days
• Travel reimbursement
• Accommodation if required
• Showreel footage from the finished film

**TO APPLY**

Please apply through Mandy (linked below):

• Headshot
• Acting CV (if available)
• Showreel (if available)

Subject line:
“Sanctuary Casting – [Role Name]”

Submission deadline: 21st March

Selected applicants may be asked to submit a short self-tape or attend a brief audition.

Director / Production Team: Joanna Kucharska/Adam Carr/David Glukh
Final year student filmmakers at Wiltshire College & University Centre as part of Bournemouth University, creating a graduation short film.

[[https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/](https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/)](https://mandy.com/aa/project/3122829/sanctuary-uni-grad-film/)

items.text:
Hey liebe Filmfreunde, ich bin Gavin 20 Jahre alt und beginne diesen September meine Ausbildung als Mediengestalter Bild/Ton an der Lazi Akademie in Esslingen. Allerdings habe ich vor schon jetzt anzufangen ein paar Kurzfilme zu drehen, und wollte in die Runde fragen wer Interesse hätte   kreative ideen mitzugestalten und villeicht sogar auch schon coole Ideen hat. Ich  suche auch eine Schauspielerin oder Sängerin die gut English lesen und sprechen kann um  eine paar  minutiges Sci-fi Video zu kommentieren, Schreibt mich gerne an. und ich werde alles detalliert erklären. Viele Grüße und hoffe sehen  uns bald am Filmset  😊
Edit: Ich wollte euch noch fragen ob jemand schon Equipment hat um bei Kurzfilmen mitzumachen, oder ob jemand Erfahrungen hat, wo man sich Equipment am besten ausleihen kann.

items.text:
✨ MALE ENSEMBLE CASTING CALL ✨

MISS TOSH PRESENTS: THE BEAUTY OF BURLESQUE

📍 Globe Theatre, Downtown Los Angeles

📅 Performance Date: Thursday, March 19

We are seeking a strong male-presenting dancer/performer to join our ensemble cast for an upcoming show this Thursday.

ABOUT THE SHOW:

A high-glamour, immersive burlesque and variety experience featuring dance, aerial, circus, and theatrical storytelling. This is a luxury, fashion-forward production with an emphasis on stage presence, charisma, and elevated performance quality.

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

Confident male dancer with strong stage presence

Experience in jazz, heels, commercial, burlesque, or theatrical performance

Comfortable performing in a sensual, stylized environment

Reliable, professional, and quick to pick up choreography

Partnering experience is a plus

DETAILS:

Rehearsal: Thursday afternoon (time TBD, approx. 3 PM run-through)

Call Time: Evening (doors 7 PM / show 8 PM)

Location: Globe Theatre – 740 S Broadway, Los Angeles

Compensation: Paid (rate discussed upon booking)

TO SUBMIT:

Please send:

Name + contact info

Dance reel or performance clips

Headshot / current photos

Relevant experience

📩 Send to: [your email]

Subject Line: Male Ensemble – March 19

Note: This is a fast turnaround replacement. Priority will be given to performers who are available immediately and ready to step into an existing track.

items.title: ✨ MALE ENSEMBLE CASTING CALL ✨

items.text:
TIL TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - HANDEST JYLLAND 

Vi får mange henvendelser, men mangler lige de sidste på plads, der er et match med hår og tøjstr. Se nedenfor.

5 MANDLIGE statistroller som funktionær, alder ca. 25 - 50 år
1 KVINDELIG statistrolle som servitrice/kollega til birolle, 
alder ca. 20-30 år

Du skal kunne komme til Handest mandag 16/3 kl. 9.00 - ca. kl. 11 til en kostume/sminkeprøve, så kostume og hår er klar til optagelse.

Du skal senere på dagen kunne være med til optagelse 
16/3 ca. 15 - 02 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i en togvogn både holdende og kørende.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage + 1 sminke/kostumeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-M, ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne lave sideskilning med mindre naturlig skaldet, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage. Du skal kunne se uden briller, da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

KVINDE:
max højde 175, tøjstr. XS-S (der er kun 1 kostume muligt), ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. arm, håndled, eyeliner og øjenbryn, ingen piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet, korthåret til max længde skuldre med mindre du vil lade dig klippe til dette, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen hårextensions.
Du skal kunne se uden briller da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt en selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

XS-S (der er kun 1 kostume muligt), ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. arm, håndled, eyeliner og øjenbryn, ingen piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet, korthåret til max længde skuldre med mindre du vil lade dig klippe til dette, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen hårextensions.
Du skal kunne se uden briller da dine egne vil blive for moderne.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt en selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.
items.title: TIL TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - HANDEST JYLLAND

items.text:
SKUESPILLERE SØGES TIL KORTFILM I VEJLE 🎥
Vi søger to unge skuespillere til en kortfilm, der skal optages i Vejle.
Roller vi søger:
 Ung mand  – alder 18–20 år
 Ung kvinde  – alder 18–20 år
Vi ser gerne, at du har lidt skuespilerfaring, men det vigtigste er, at du har lyst til at være med i et kreativt filmprojekt.
Optagelser:
 📍Vejle
 📆Dato oplyses ved henvendelse
Praktisk info:
Projektet er ulønnet, men der vil være mad og snacks på settet, og du får en fed oplevelse med filmproduktion samt mulighed for at udvide dit netværk.
Interesseret?
Send en besked med:
• Navn
• Alder
• Et billede af dig selv
• Eventuel skuespilerfaring
Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text:
✨ MALE ENSEMBLE CASTING CALL ✨

MISS TOSH PRESENTS: THE BEAUTY OF BURLESQUE

📍 Globe Theatre, Downtown Los Angeles

📅 Performance Date: Thursday, March 19

We are seeking a strong male-presenting dancer/performer to join our ensemble cast for an upcoming show this Thursday.

ABOUT THE SHOW:

A high-glamour, immersive burlesque and variety experience featuring dance, aerial, circus, and theatrical storytelling. This is a luxury, fashion-forward production with an emphasis on stage presence, charisma, and elevated performance quality.

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

Confident male dancer with strong stage presence

Experience in jazz, heels, commercial, burlesque, or theatrical performance

Comfortable performing in a sensual, stylized environment

Reliable, professional, and quick to pick up choreography

Partnering experience is a plus

DETAILS:

Rehearsal: Thursday afternoon (time TBD, approx. 3 PM run-through)

Call Time: Evening (doors 7 PM / show 8 PM)

Location: Globe Theatre – 740 S Broadway, Los Angeles

Compensation: Paid (rate discussed upon booking)

TO SUBMIT:

Please send:

Name + contact info

Dance reel or performance clips

Headshot / current photos

Relevant experience

📩 Send to: [your email]

Subject Line: Male Ensemble – March 19

Note: This is a fast turnaround replacement. Priority will be given to performers who are available immediately and ready to step into an existing track.

***CASTING CALL***

❗*ʀᴇᴀᴅ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ*❗

ʙʀɪᴇꜰ  #087
 
ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ: ɴᴇᴛꜰʟɪx/ɢᴀᴍʙɪᴛ
ᴘʀᴏᴊᴇᴄᴛ: ʙꜱ
 
ꜱʜᴏᴏᴛ ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇ: ᴀꜱᴀᴘ (ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ɪɴ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ᴜɴᴛɪʟ ᴇɴᴅ ᴀᴘʀɪʟ)
ʙᴀꜱᴇᴄᴀᴍᴘ: ᴏᴏꜱᴛᴇʀᴢᴇᴇ ꜱᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴘᴀʀᴋ ᴀɴᴅ ʀɪᴅᴇ

ʀᴏʟᴇ: ꜱᴛᴜᴅᴇɴᴛꜱ/ᴀᴅᴜʟᴛꜱ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅ

ᴍɪɴɪᴍᴜᴍ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ: 
* ᴀɴʏ ɢᴇɴᴅᴇʀ
* ᴄᴀᴜᴄᴀꜱɪᴀɴꜱ ᴏɴʟʏ
* 15 - 65 ʏʀꜱ ᴏꜰ ᴀɢᴇ

ʀᴀᴛᴇꜱ:
* ᴅᴀʏ ʀᴀᴛᴇ - ʀ400

ᴛᴏ ᴀᴘᴘʟʏ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ɴᴀʟᴇᴅɪ ᴏɴ 0761802729 ᴡɪᴛʜ:
* ʙʀɪᴇꜰ # | ꜰᴜʟʟ ɴᴀᴍᴇ 
* ᴍᴇᴀꜱᴜʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ
* 1 ʀᴇᴄᴇɴᴛ ʜᴇᴀᴅꜱʜᴏᴛꜱ
* 2 ʀᴇᴄᴇɴᴛ ꜰᴜʟʟ ʟᴇɴɢᴛʜ

ᴊᴏɪɴ ᴏᴜʀ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ ꜰᴏʀ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ɪɴ ꜱᴏᴜᴛʜ ᴀꜰʀɪᴄᴀ:
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

___

ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ᴀ ᴍᴏᴍᴇɴᴛ ᴛᴏ ᴀʟꜱᴏ ᴇɴᴊᴏʏ ᴀ ɢᴏᴏᴅ ʀᴇᴀᴅ:
naledigoottsch.com/blog

PAID ACTORS - Chicago 

Casting Call! Children, Female & Male Talent Needed

I’m the producer for this award-winning production. We are currently seeking actors to audition self-tapes,  all selected actors will be called back for an in person a audition.

If you’re interested please email us at BTDcasting2026@gmail.com and we will send you the sides to work from. 

Singing is a plus. 

The character and concept is unusual and so we are very open as to who can submit!

It's Your Time To SHINE!!!

BTD 
#whosaiditcouldntbedone 
#awardwinningplay
#letsgo
