items.text:
Teamwork makes the dream work.
I am starting a production company that will make films grounded in realism, depth and human nature.

I am looking for other passionate filmmakers who want to create something great. I am basing my model on everyone involved in the film has an equal share in it. Too many production companies prey on upcoming actors and crew, using them and keeping all the credit and profits to themselves. Getting enough of us together, we can say no thanks, we're making our own films as a team, with enough talented individuals putting in the time and work together, we can do great things and make great films. 

Looking for actors, DOPs, sound engineers, producers, editors, assistants and everything in-between who want to be involved in starting this production company together. 

Let's build something amazing and make some great films.

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

🎬😂 CALLING ALL ACTORS & FILMMAKERS – READY FOR A WEEKEND OF PREMIERE FILM SCREENINGS; WORKSHOPS; NETWORKING; Q&As….and LAUGHS?

The Funny Life Film Festival is back NEXT WEEKEND

📅 Friday 20th & Saturday 21st March 2026

📍 Collective Studio, Islington, London 

✨ Comedy Short Film Programmes 
✨ Feature Film Premieres
✨ LIVE Stand-Up Comedy
✨ Filmmaker Q&As
✨ Industry Workshops

Whether you love indie film, comedy, or just want a brilliant night out — this is for you.

🎟️ Tickets selling fast/ Grab a programme →

www.thefunnylifefilmfestival.com/2026

👉 Tag a friend who needs a laugh.

 

See you there!!!

items.text:
**Oferta pracy - Model do aktu pełnego na warsztaty „Malowanie z Winem”**

**Głównie: Gdańsk **
Jeśli jesteś mobilny i możesz dojeżdżać na terenie, śmiało, zgłoś się!

Szukamy modela, który swoją obecnością urozmaici nasze wyjątkowe, artystyczne wydarzenia z cyklu **Malowanie z Winem**.
**Co oferujemy?**
* Udział w kreatywnych wydarzeniach artystycznych w różnych miastach Polski
* Przyjazną atmosferę i profesjonalną organizację
* Stałą współpracę przy cyklicznych warsztatach
* Jasne zasady i komfortowe warunki pracy

**Czego oczekujemy?**
* Dbałości o higienę osobistą
* Sylwetki umiarkowanie wysportowanej
* Pewności siebie, swobodnego podejścia do pracy z grupą i pozytywnej energii
* Portfolio lub aktualnych zdjęć (maks. 3 miesiące do tyłu) – **półakty!**

**Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej lub na sara@malowaniezwinem.pl**

**Sprawdź! **

**Nasza strona: **https://malowaniezwinem.pl/

**Instagram: **https://www.instagram.com/malowaniezwinem.pl

items.summary:
**Oferta pracy - Model do aktu pełnego na warsztaty „Malowanie z Winem”**

**Głównie: Gdańsk **
Jeśli jesteś mobilny i możesz dojeżdżać na terenie, śmiało, zgłoś się!

Szukamy modela, który swoją obecnością urozmaici nasze wyjątkowe, artystyczne wydarzenia z cyklu **Malowanie z Winem**.
**Co oferujemy?**
* Udział w kreatywnych wydarzeniach artystycznych w różnych miastach Polski
* Przyjazną atmosferę i profesjonalną organizację
* Stałą współpracę przy cyklicznych warsztatach
* Jasne zasady i komfortowe warunki pracy

**Czego oczekujemy?**
* Dbałości o higienę osobistą
* Sylwetki umiarkowanie wysportowanej
* Pewności siebie, swobodnego podejścia do pracy z grupą i pozytywnej energii
* Portfolio lub aktualnych zdjęć (maks. 3 miesiące do tyłu) – **półakty!**

**Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej lub na sara@malowaniezwinem.pl**

**Sprawdź! **

**Nasza strona: **https://malowaniezwinem.pl/

**Instagram: **https://www.instagram.com/malowaniezwinem.pl

Zbiórka o 9:00 w ATM. 

STAWKA 120 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: A17

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia.

Widzimy się na planie!

items.text:
Witam!
Planujemy nagranie amatorskiego filmu krótkometrażowego osadzonego w uniwersum *Life is Strange*. Na razie jesteśmy na bardzo wczesnym etapie projektu - robimy pierwsze kroki i sprawdzamy, czy w ogóle znajdą się chętni do udziału.

Szukamy osoby, która chciałaby wcielić się w rolę **Chloe Price**, główną bohaterke filmu. Idealnie byłaby to dziewczyna o następujących cechach:

- wiek: 16 - 24 lata
- szczupła (najlepiej wręcz chuda) sylwetka
- wzrost 170 cm +/- 10 cm
- krótsze włosy z możliwością chwilowego pofarbowania (np. szamponetką/jednorazową farbą)
- w przypadku dłuższych włosów możemy rozważyć użycie peruki

Znajomość gry oraz lekko chłopczycowe usposobienie będą dużym atutem, ale absolutnie nie są konieczne.

Ze względu na amatorski charakter projektu nie jesteśmy w stanie zaoferować realnego wynagrodzenia (ewentualnie bardzo symboliczne). Cały budżet przeznaczamy na produkcję, a sami również nic na tym nie zarabiamy. Liczymy więc na osoby, którym bliska jest idea **„sztuki dla sztuki”** – może ktoś spełni w ten sposób marzenie o wystąpieniu w filmie albo po prostu będzie chciał wziąć udział w ciekawym projekcie 🙂

Zdjęcia planujemy orientacyjnie** wiosną przyszłego roku** w **okolicach Wrocławia** w promieniu około 70 km.

Jeśli ktoś byłby zainteresowany albo chciałby dowiedzieć się więcej – zapraszamy do kontaktu poprzez wiadomość prywatną na facebooku.

items.text:
GULLIVER’S WORLD IS CASTING FOR PERFORMERS TO JOIN OUR EXPERIENCE CAST 

DANCERS, ACTORS, STREET THEATRE PERFORMERS, ACTIVITY RANGERS & STAGE PRESENTERS

OPEN AUDITION & INTERVIEWS : GULLIVER'S WORLD, WARRINGTON - FLEXIBLE OPPORTUNITIES FOR BOTH DAYTIME & EVENING PROGRAMMING

COME ALONG AND MEET THE CASTING TEAM
FRIDAY 20TH MARCH 2026 -  Gulliver's World Resort Hotel, Shackleton Close, Warrington, WA5 9YZ.  Registration at 6pm.  Report to the hotel reception with your CV.   Please come with suitable attire to dance.  

Free car parking available on site.  If you cannot make the audition date but are interested in 2026 opportunities, please email Casting with your CV and more information on your availability.

Street Theatre Entertainers: Delivering spooky fun and interactive experiences, captivating guests with your improvisation and character creation skills. If you have any circus skills or stilt experience this would advantageous. 
Dancers: Shine in our daytime, street theatre and evening concerts.

Stage Presenters: Bring alive the magic at our resort taking part in staged events, shows and pop up live events.

Activity Rangers: Help take our overnight adventure to the next level on our activity sleepovers.  You will be embracing the great outdoors delivering bushcraft, firefighting, den building or being the face of nature activities for educational sleep-overs and activity camps. Full concept training provided.

casting@gulliversfun.co.uk

items.title: # **🎬😂 CALLING ALL ACTORS & FILMMAKERS – READY FOR A WEEKEND OF LAUGHS; FILMS; NETWORKING & WORKSHOPS?**

items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

🎥 Produktion: TT Films
💰 Gage: Keine (Hobbyprojekt), aber Material für dein Showreel & Verpflegung am Set.

📩 Bei Interesse: kurze Vorstellung + 2–3 Fotos senden.

items.title: Hello everybody,

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - Kinderrolle (Junge, 6-8 Jahre)**

Liebe filminteressierte Familien,

für unseren Kurzfilm „Death Drive“ (AT) von Studierenden der Filmuniversität Babelsberg und der Freien Universität Berlin suchen wir einen Jungen im Spielalter von 6–8 Jahren für die Hauptrolle.

**Details zum Projekt:**
• Drehzeitraum: Ende April 2026
• Voraussichtliche Drehtage: 18. & 19. April sowie 25. & 26. April 2026
• Insgesamt ca. 4 Drehtage in Berlin/Brandenburg
• Keine schauspielerische Vorerfahrung notwendig

• Keine Gage

**Bewerbung:**
Bitte sendet 2–3 aktuelle, natürliche Fotos (Porträt & Ganzkörper – keine Filter, keine professionellen Fotos nötig) sowie ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo (einfach mit dem Handy aufgenommen) an: [deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com](mailto:deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com)

Bei Anfrage können wir euch gerne mehr Informationen sowie das Drehbuch zukommen lassen. Wir freuen uns sehr über eure Einsendungen und Tipps!

Viele Grüße
Laura

items.text:
Last call for auditions for Darjeeling!
We are still in need of a Josey! Butches and mascs, please give it a go!

Title: Darjeeling

Genre: Romantic drama

Logline: Two ex-roommates with a past full of loose ends reconnect over an imminent tragedy.

Roles (Casting all races and ethnicities. Trans/queer people and people of color encouraged to audition!):

Tate: 24 (casting 18-25), femme lesbian, painter. Distraught at the prospect of a family tragedy, she turns to the only person she knows can help her.

Josey: 23 (casting 18-25), non-binary butch lesbian, muse. It’s been years, Josey knows that—but they’ll be damned if they’re leaving Tate to worry alone tonight.

Extras: We will need extras to mill about an art gallery for the final scene. No restrictions on casting.

Production Team: Parker Watson - Director, Louis White - Producer

Production Type: CU Denver Student Film

Contact Information: DarjeelingShortFilm@gmail.com or @darjeelingfilm on Instagram. Please send any questions there.

Run Time: 7-minute short

Compensation: Unpaid, snacks and meals provided!

Union Status: Non-union

Audition Information: Self-tapes are accepted through March 14 at this link: https://forms.gle/RnKkEq6oPWTgA7v78 

Shooting Schedule: April 2-5. Only 2 shoot days should be needed, so if you have conflicts, please still apply!

Filming Location: CU Denver campus and downtown Denver

Note: This film will be shown at CU Denver's Cinefest in mid-May. All cast and crew are welcome to come and will receive further information as filming progresses.

items.text:
Calling All Screenwriters Development Funding Available for Qualified Screenwriters:

Hello Screenwriters,
If you’re a Screenwriter, whether you're a beginner or an experienced Screenwriter and you're serious about bringing your script to life, we have an opportunity for you.

We are currently working with partners who can help Screenwriters secure development funding to move their project toward pre-production.

To qualify for this opportunity, Screenwriters must have a credit score of 680 or higher.
If you are serious about turning your vision into reality and want to explore funding options, please contact:

Clay Walker
SAG-AFTRA Member
Actor | Producer | Executive Producer
CEO & Founder
Steven Walker Productions
Website: www.swprod.world
Phone: 1-888-643-6933
Email: cwalker@swprod.world
Based in Colorado, USA

Are you serious and meet the criteria to turn your Screenplay into a real, captivating production? If your answer is (YES)
Click the link:
Development Film Funding https://fundinginsidersclub.com/clay
items.previewDescription: Clay started his Acting & Producing career at the University of Nebraske-Lincoln "GBR" later moved to Los Angeles, Ca. While living in Los Angeles, Clay has worked on numerous television shows including: CSI Las Vegas, CSI Miami, Numbers, Scrubs, Criminal Minds and Everybody Hates Chris. He has work...

🗣️ REAL PEOPLE CASTING 🥞
Live in Philly? Gen Z? Love to bake + make pancakes? This one’s for you! 🍪

Working with Dig Projects (https://digprojects.com/) to find participants for an upcoming research project (think of it as a cross between marketing and a documentary).

PAID opportunity where we’ll be chatting with real baking enthusiasts about their preferences and everyday lives — it’s not an ad, just internal research featuring authentic voices.

🥐 If you or someone you know might be a good fit, please fill out this quick form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdVyZR6W1W6WXF-TwJi6wAznzhXPHJIkRFOmur-sT707YrdeA/viewform

🧁 Feel free to share with friends, family, neighbors, anyone in the Philadelphia area who isn't afraid to talk about baking (oh yeah, and if you refer someone who gets selected, you get $100!). 

Questions? Hit my comments!

#marketingresearch #strategyinsights #documentaryfilmmaking #casting #philly #philadelphia #realpeople #GenZ #baking
